response.overview: The news program "Sucesos Peruanos" began production after the failure of state-sponsored news services. Urteaga explains: "We produce these news programs twice a month, and they are affiliated with the First Association of News Programs and the OSA (Organization of Peruvian News Producers). The previous regime's official news programs were almost entirely limited to showcasing its own activities. In contrast, the current regime will acquire content for each program, and therefore these programs will have maximum freedom to cover all kinds of topics, whether cultural, sporting, artistic, or otherwise."
response.title: Sucesos Peruanos
